name: Recent Install - Refuses to Submit Another
description: Caller explicitly does not want to submit another claim.
entryAgent: TBD - set after agents are built
initialMessage: Look, I had an issue after install but I do NOT want to submit another claim.
expectedOutcome: Agent respects the refusal, explains options without pressure, offers a transfer to a specialist or guidance on replying to an existing claim email, and does not loop on form submission.
